universal.note: Universal abilities are available to all families and scale with the highest relevant stat.

cross_family.note: Cross-family abilities are versatile skills that can be learned by any family, often with unique effects that complement multiple playstyles.

status.note: Status abilities apply various conditions to targets, affecting their performance in combat.

primacore_special.note: Primacore SPECIAL is narrative-locked and not usable by the player.
